message:
feat: add integration test infrastructure (DIAL-ifk)

Add HID device abstraction and mock implementations for testing:
- src/hid/mod.rs: HidDevice trait, RealHidDevice wrapper, DialReport parsing
- src/hid/mock.rs: MockHidDevice with event queuing for testing
- src/platform/mock.rs: Thread-safe MockPlatform for integration tests

Add integration test suites:
- tests/hid_integration.rs: HID device simulation tests
- tests/input_integration.rs: Click detection and rotation processing tests
- tests/config_integration.rs: Configuration persistence and validation tests

This enables testing without physical hardware by providing:
- Mock HID device that can queue rotation/button events
- Mock platform that records all audio/key operations
- 45+ integration tests covering cross-module interactions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
